_comment: Expected audit trail values when mysterycall_clean_phase1() is run on the canonical 4-row test fixture defined in test-audit-trail-snapshot.R. Any change to these numbers means the cleaning logic changed for the canonical input. Input: 4 rows, 6 columns. Row 3 has empty name + NA npi. Row 4 is single-word name ('Carol') which also has no extractable last name. duplicate_rows = FALSE.
